items.title: Iran says deal to end fighting with US has 'never been closer'
items.dek: Both Iran and Pakistan say a deal has never been closer - echoing US President Donald Trump's statement on Thursday.
items.body: Both Iran and Pakistan say a deal has never been closer - echoing US President Donald Trump's statement on Thursday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: King leads tributes to 'giant of the art world' David Hockney
items.dek: The artist, who has died at the age of 88, "was one of life's true originals", King Charles says.
items.body: The artist, who has died at the age of 88, "was one of life's true originals", King Charles says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mother finds body of missing son two days after Kenya's Ebola quarantine centre protests
items.dek: Sylvester Muigai Ndung'u was in Nanyuki to fetch a school uniform on Tuesday, his mother says.
items.body: Sylvester Muigai Ndung'u was in Nanyuki to fetch a school uniform on Tuesday, his mother says.
